problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
